seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response.
new_constraint: Avoid using the phrase "value your contributions."
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response. Avoid using the phrase "value your contributions."
response:
Subject: Vacation Request Approval - [Employee Name]

Hi [Employee Name],

I am writing to let you know that your vacation request for [Dates] has been approved. 

Please ensure that you coordinate with the rest of the team to hand over any pending tasks or ongoing projects before your time off begins. We want to make sure everything runs smoothly while you are away.

We appreciate the hard work you put in every day, and we truly value your contributions to the team. Enjoy your well-deserved break!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>
